basics.name: Andrew Hope
basics.summary: I am a rising senior at the University of Michigan, studying physics and mathematics. I am pursuing an honors thesis in cosmology theory, and I also have done quite a bit of research in instrumentation--including at Fermilab and LBNL. I am the co-president of the UM Society of Physics Students, and I have won over $74,000 in scholarships, awards, and fellowships for my academic and research work in undergrad.
